heading: Salaries and expenses for Senate Majority and Minority Policy Committees and Senate Majority and Minority Conference Committees
label: 6153 Salaries and expenses for Senate Majority and Minority Policy Committees and Senate Majority and Minority Conference Committees
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section. Amendments2015—Subsec. (c). , added subsec. (c). Former subsec. (c) redesignated (d).Pub. L. 114–113, § 2(2)Subsec. (d). , redesignated subsec. (c) as (d). Former subsec. (d) redesignated (e).Pub. L. 114–113, § 2(1)Subsec. (d)(1). , inserted “or the Office of the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be,” after “such committee” in two places.Pub. L. 114–113, § 2(3)(A)Subsec. (d)(2). , inserted “or the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be,” after “the Chairman”.Pub. L. 114–113, § 2(3)(B)Subsec. (e). , (4), redesignated subsec. (d) as (e) and inserted “or the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be,” after “The Chairman of a committee”.Pub. L. 114–113, § 2(1)1995— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The Chairman of the Majority or Minority Conference Committee of the Senate may, during any fiscal year (commencing with the fiscal year ending ), at his election transfer not more than $275,000 from the appropriation account for salaries for the Conference of the Majority and the Conference of the Minority of the Senate, to the account, within the contingent fund of the Senate, from which expenses are payable under . Any transfer of funds under authority of the preceding sentence shall be made at such time or times as such chairman shall specify in writing to the Senate Disbursing Office. Any funds so transferred by the Chairman of the Majority or Minority Conference Committee shall be available for expenditure by such committee in like manner and for the same purposes as are other moneys which are available for expenditure by such committee from the account, within the contingent fund of the Senate, from which expenses are payable under .”Pub. children.heading: Transfer of funds for Policy Committees
children.label: a Transfer of funds for Policy Committees

children.text: The Chairman of the Majority or Minority Policy Committee of the Senate may, during any fiscal year, at his or her election transfer funds from the appropriation account for salaries for the Majority and Minority Policy Committees of the Senate, to the account, within the contingent fund of the Senate, from which expenses are payable for such committees.

The Chairman of the Majority or Minority Policy Committee of the Senate may, during any fiscal year, at his or her election transfer funds from the appropriation account for expenses, within the contingent fund of the Senate, for the Majority and Minority Policy Committees of the Senate, to the account from which salaries are payable for such committees.

children.heading: Transfer of funds for Conference Committees
children.label: b Transfer of funds for Conference Committees

children.text: The Chairman of the Majority or Minority Conference Committee of the Senate may, during any fiscal year, at his or her election transfer funds from the appropriation account for salaries for the Majority and Minority Conference Committees of the Senate, to the account, within the contingent fund of the Senate, from which expenses are payable for such committees.

The Chairman of the Majority or Minority Conference Committee of the Senate may, during any fiscal year, at his or her election transfer funds from the appropriation account for expenses, within the contingent fund of the Senate, for the Majority and Minority Conference Committees of the Senate, to the account from which salaries are payable for such committees.

children.heading: Transfer of funds by Chaplain of the Senate
children.label: c Transfer of funds by Chaplain of the Senate

children.text: The Chaplain of the Senate may, during any fiscal year, at the election of the Chaplain of the Senate, transfer funds from the appropriation account for salaries for the Office of the Chaplain of the Senate to the account, within the contingent fund of the Senate, from which expenses are payable for the Office of the Chaplain.

The Chaplain of the Senate may, during any fiscal year, at the election of the Chaplain of the Senate, transfer funds from the appropriation account for expenses, within the contingent fund of the Senate, for the Office of the Chaplain to the account from which salaries are payable for the Office of the Chaplain of the Senate.

available for expenditure by such committee or the Office of the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be, in like manner and for the same purposes as are other moneys which are available for expenditure by such committee or the Office of the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be, from the account to which the funds were transferred; and
made at such time or times as the Chairman or the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be, shall specify in writing to the Senate Disbursing Office.

children.heading: Notification to Committee on Appropriations
children.label: e Notification to Committee on Appropriations
children.text: The Chairman of a committee or the Chaplain of the Senate, as the case may be, transferring funds under this section shall notify the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate of the transfer.
